name: chile-compliance
description: Single-plugin marketplace exposing chile-compliance: a structured AI-queryable knowledge base of Chilean fintech (Ley 21.521) and personal-data (Ley 19.628 + Ley 21.719) law.

plugins.name: chile-compliance
plugins.description: Structured access to Chilean fintech (Ley 21.521) and personal-data (Ley 19.628 as amended by Ley 21.719, in force 2026-12-01) for AI agents. Includes lexicon, topical index, glossary of defined terms, scenario checklists, and article-to-article cross-references.
